sentences.text: Thank you for calling advantage Capital management. If you know, the extension of the person you are trying to reach you may dial it at any time during this message to access the dial by name directory press one or for operator assistance press zero or stay on the line. By using the keys on your touch tone phone. Please enter the first or last name of the party you wish to reach press Star at anytime to return to the main menu. Your party. To reach M O O R E R a M O N I C a press one to reach M O R T L a N D C O N N O R press to to go back to the previous menu press the star key to repeat this menu by using the keys on your touch tone phone. Please enter the first or your call is being transferred please hold.

conversation.title: Call: Dan Cellon and Patricia Gaudin @ Avanath Realty
